title: Controlled drug review documentation

referral.text: Supports documenting chronic pain, opioid use, medicine history, psychosocial context, alcohol or illicit substance context, function, and specialist involvement.
referral.rationale: Supports opioid use, medicine history, chronic pain, psychosocial, substance-use and functional assessment for controlled-drug pain review documentation; no decision is generated.
referral.evidence_extract: Supports documenting chronic pain, opioid use, medicine history, psychosocial context, alcohol or illicit substance context, function, and specialist involvement.

source.title: Surgery and Opioids: Best Practice Guidelines 2021

source_limitations: All item-level mappings remain unsupported pending separate clinician review and signed approval.
Medicine, dose, duration, indication, adherence, effect, adverse effects, misuse risk, monitoring, legal checks and prescriber plan are absent.
No diagnosis, interpretation, investigation, treatment, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, escalation or disposition is generated for controlled-drug pain review documentation.
Any legacy item not explicitly mapped to an exact section remains unsupported pending qualified clinician review.
No mapping authorises an automatic diagnosis, differential, investigation, management decision, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, urgency conclusion, discharge decision, or patient instruction.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
